title: Super Mario 64 Corruption Adventures
description: It's time to take the corrupting to the next game, Super Mario 64! This is me exploring the screwed up world of SM64. There are a lot of strange aspects and occurrences, although it is creepy and funny at the same time. Like Mario going "Whoa!" every second or two, the scary castle music, the growing and shrinking of the left fist, the "yeyeyeyeyeyeyeyahoo!" voices, and the graphics of course is a classic style of corrupting. But overall, I find it enjoyably funny. There will be more parts coming soon for your information. And oh.. don't forget to subscribe and tell what you think of my videos, just for the side note.
